display.purpose: Hero marketing text and big welcome greets.

title.purpose: Major card elements and interactive sections.

body.purpose: Medical summaries, diagnostics, and patient descriptions.

label.purpose: Exact numeric data, laboratory metrics, and tags.

shadows.name: interactive-rise
shadows.purpose: Diffuse elevation on hover for interactive elements.

shadows.name: popover-focus
shadows.purpose: Floating panels, navigation dropdowns, and clinical overlays.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Ultra-smooth exponential ease-out for all visual transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action element used across interactive patient and lab views.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #2e2e2e; color: #fafafa; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(179,179,179,0.5); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Used for alternative, supportive, or passive dashboard options.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background-color: #f5f5f5; color: #2e2e2e; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #ebebeb; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #e5e5e5; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(179,179,179,0.5); }

components.name: Clinical TextInput
components.description: Clean, highly structured input fields for patient and lab info entry.
components.css: .ds-input-default { background-color: #f5f5f5; color: #212121; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #ebebeb; width: 100%; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input-default::placeholder { color: #8a8a8a; } .ds-input-default:focus { background-color: #ffffff; border-color: #2e2e2e; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(179,179,179,0.5); }

components.name: Sanctuary Card
components.description: Structured containers to group diagnostic reports, tables, or records.
components.html:
Total Cholesterol

Detailed breakdown of lipid profiles and target medical ranges.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ebebeb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #212121; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 1rem; color: #8a8a8a; margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: The Clinical Sanctuary is an interface design strategy formulated specifically for multi-register healthcare portals. It represents the meeting point of deep clinical accuracy and absolute patient composure. By prioritizing serene whitespace, clear semantic layouts, and highly readable high-contrast typographic grids, the system offers an anchor of safety for stressed patients while ensuring a friction-free, high-speed environment for clinical laboratory workers.
keyCharacteristics: Calm Atmosphere: Generous whitespace and low-stimulus transitions reduce cognitive friction.
Extreme Contrast & Legibility: High typographic scales and dark carbon text elements on pristine background layers ensure effortless readability.
Symmetric Balance: A strict grid layout keeps dashboard data structured, uncrowded, and highly reassuring.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Bold red and destructive statuses must be used on less than 5% of any screen. If everything screams, nothing is heard. High-contrast indicators are reserved solely for true clinical alerts or required user corrections.

rules.name: The No-Color-Reflex Rule
rules.body: Avoid default blue and teal highlights for active elements. Keep the interface monochromatic (carbon, gray, and pristine alabaster) so status colors remain completely distinct.

rules.name: The 65ch Doctrine
rules.body: To maximize readability, paragraph and text container content must never extend past 65 characters in line length.

rules.name: The Flat Resting Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest entirely flat on the Sanctuary Background canvas. Depth is conveyed purely through alabaster background blocks or clean clinical border divisions.

dos: Do wrap tabular medical reports in clean, grid-aligned cards with a minimum of 24px of internal padding to ensure high readability.
Do use Geist Mono for all test result metrics, normal ranges, and reference values.
Do use whitespace as a functional layout tool, ensuring at least 32px of spacing between major dashboard sections.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored side-stripe accent on status cards or alert notifications.
Don't combine background-clip: text with gradient fills to create decorative headers.
Don't use heavy glassmorphic blurs or decorative transparent overlays on medical report screens.
Don't design identical multi-column card grids with repetitious icons for diverse clinical operations.
Don't use modals as a first-choice interaction for editing records; prefer inline forms or dedicated routes.
Don't use em-dashes in medical labels or instruction copy; use colons, semicolons, or commas instead.
